transcript: Speaker A: अरे यह तो बहुत आसान है [Hey, this is very easy] Speaker B: हाँ, इंग्लिश सीखना आसान ही है। बस तुम्हें ऐसे प्रैक्टिस करते रहना और दो हफ्ते में तुम्हारी इंग्लिश फर्स्ट क्लास हो जाएगी। [Yes, learning English is indeed easy. You just have to keep practicing like this and in two weeks your English will become first class.] Speaker A: यह मैं कहाँ कर सकता हूँ? [Where can I do this?] Speaker B: तुम्हें बस SpeakX ऐप डाउनलोड करना है। इसमें मेरे जैसे AI इंग्लिश टीचर तुम्हें बिना जजमेंट के इंग्लिश प्रैक्टिस कराएंगे और तुम्हारा इंग्लिश फर्राटेदार हो जाएगी। जल्दी SpeakX डाउनलोड करो और दो हफ्ते में अपने इंग्लिश से सबको इम्प्रेस करो। [You just have to download the SpeakX app. In this, AI English teachers like me will make you practice English without judgment and your English will become fluent. Download SpeakX quickly and impress everyone with your English in two weeks.]
on_screen_text:
Office main kaam aane wali English [English useful in office]
Arre yeh toh bahut [Hey, this is very]
aasan hai [easy]
Haan English seekhna [Yes, learning English]
aasan hi hai [is indeed easy]
Bas kumhe aise [You just have to]
practice karte [keep practicing]
rehna aur do hafte [like this and two weeks]
me tumhari English [in your English]
first class ho [will become first class]
jayegi [will become]
Yeh main kaha [Where can I]
kar sakta hu [do this]
TALK ABOUT ANYTHING
Speak with AI TEACHER
Talk Now
Ongoing call
Connecting...
summary: A split-screen conversation between a human and an AI avatar highlights how easy it is to learn English. The AI avatar recommends downloading the SpeakX app to practice English with AI teachers without judgment, promising fluency in just two weeks.
